zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton是Humphrey Morton的女兒，於大約1471年出生在英國英格蘭。她於大約1491年與Sir Richard Halse在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton是Humphrey Morton的女儿，于大约1471年出生在英国英格兰。她于大约1491年与Sir Richard Halse在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Morton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

variants.name: Moreton
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Murton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in northern England, all named in Old English as ‘settlement or enclosure at the marsh or moor’, from mōr ‘marsh, fen, moor’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. There has been considerable confusion with both Morton and Merton .

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton was born about 1471, in England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Humphrey Morton. She married Sir Richard Halse about 1491, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton est née environ 1471, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Humphrey Morton. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Halse environ 1491, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton wurde um 1471 in England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Humphrey Morton geboren. Sie hat um 1491 in England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Halse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton è nata il circa 1471 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Humphrey Morton. Lei sposato Sir Richard Halse circa 1491, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Mortonは約1471年にイギリスイギリスでHumphrey Mortonの娘として生まれた。約1491年にイギリスイギリスでSir Richard Halseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton(은)는 대략 1471년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Humphrey Morton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1491년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Richard Halse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton nasceu aproximadamente 1471, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Humphrey Morton. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Halse aproximadamente 1491, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton родилась около 1471 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Humphrey Morton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Halse около 1491 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Morton nació aproximadamente 1471, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Humphrey Morton. Se casó con Sir Richard Halse aproximadamente 1491, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas.
